exec_args.query: SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table';

args.query:
SELECT "Index", SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" > "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS up_days, SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" < "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS down_days
FROM index_trade
WHERE CAST("Date" AS DATE) >= DATE '2018-01-01' AND CAST("Date" AS DATE) < DATE '2019-01-01'
AND "Index" IN ('^GSPC','^DJI','^IXIC','^RUT','^GSPTSE','^MXX')
GROUP BY "Index";

args.query:
SELECT "Index", SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" > "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS up_days, SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" < "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS down_days
FROM index_trade
WHERE CAST("Date" AS DATE) >= DATE '2018-01-01' AND CAST("Date" AS DATE) < DATE '2019-01-01'
AND "Index" IN ('IXIC','NYA','GSPTSE')
GROUP BY "Index"
HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" > "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" < "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
ORDER BY "Index";

exec_args.sql:

FROM index_trade

AND "Index" IN ('IXIC','NYA','GSPTSE')

ORDER BY "Index";

args.query:
SELECT "Index",
  SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" > "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS up_days,
  SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" < "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS down_days
FROM index_trade
WHERE try_strptime("Date", '%Y-%m-%d') >= DATE '2018-01-01' AND try_strptime("Date", '%Y-%m-%d') < DATE '2019-01-01'
GROUP BY "Index";

args.query:
SELECT "Index",
  SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" > "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS up_days,
  SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" < "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS down_days
FROM index_trade
WHERE year(try_strptime("Date", '%d %b %Y, %H:%M')) = 2018
GROUP BY "Index";
